1.premise: Singular they/them pronouns are treated as literal multiple people.
A date using they/them pronouns implies extra dinner guests to pay for.

2.premise: Using they/them for one absent date makes the waiter expect a group.

lines.text: Yeah, yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm dating-- I had one on a date with a white woman.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's important that I say that part for the story.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And as I was getting to know her,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: she was telling me how she was into gender pronouns
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and how she identified as a they/them,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: which is a crazy sentence to hear.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I'm a super chill guy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I didn't overreact.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, if this how you choose to live your life,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'll call you what you want to be called.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I did let her--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I did let them know, before we go out,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I can only afford to pay for me and you.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And if that's gonna be a problem, we shouldn't do this,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: 'cause they could come, just make sure they bring money,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: for real, 'cause if they order anything off of this menu,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: they gonna pay for the shit, gratuity and all.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: They're gonna be stuck with the bill for seven fucking people,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: 'cause you don't know who you wanna be in life.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's not my responsibility, and I refuse to deal with it.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: The part that pissed me off the most
lines.label: setup

lines.text: was they got up when it was time to order,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: so now I look like a dumbass at the table,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause the waiter take the order, he like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Sir, what would you like?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Put my order in with confidence."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Then he was like, "What about your guests?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "I don't know what they want."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He said, "They? You expecting more people?"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I was like, "No, it's just one of them."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: He said, "One of them?"
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I said, "Yes, nigga, one of them."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I don't know what the fuck I just said.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I'm confused, too.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I thought you helped me figure this shit out, for real.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: 'Cause at this point, it's us versus them,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: and we're losing.
lines.label: tag
